---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea to make StreamGuard better for streamers
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
*Example: "It's frustrating that I can't see viewer join/leave events..."*

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

How would this feature help you or other streamers? The more specific the better.

## Additional Context

Any mockups, screenshots, or examples from other tools that do something similar.
